# Getting help

Mycelium is a community-run open-source project; there is no paid support tier. Pick the channel that matches what you need:

| You want to | Use |
|---|---|
| Ask a usage question or start a design discussion | [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/Arka-ui/mycelium/discussions) |
| Report a defect | [Open an issue](https://github.com/Arka-ui/mycelium/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) using the **Bug report** template |
| Propose a small feature | [Open an issue](https://github.com/Arka-ui/mycelium/issues/new?template=feature_request.md) using the **Feature request** template |
| Propose an architectural or protocol change | [Open an issue](https://github.com/Arka-ui/mycelium/issues/new?template=rfc.md) using the **RFC** template |
| Disclose a security vulnerability | [Private security advisory](https://github.com/Arka-ui/mycelium/security/advisories/new) — see [`SECURITY.md`](SECURITY.md) for the disclosure policy |

## Before opening an issue

- Search existing issues. There is a good chance someone hit the same problem.
- Read [`../docs/INSTALLATION.md`](../docs/INSTALLATION.md) (end users) or [`../docs/SETUP.md`](../docs/SETUP.md) (contributors) — most install-time questions are already answered.
- Include the version number (Settings → About) and your operating system version.

## What to expect

- **Bug reports**: triaged within a week. Critical bugs (data loss, security) take priority.
- **Feature requests**: read and labelled. Acceptance depends on alignment with `../docs/MYCELIUM.md` and `../docs/SPECIFICATION.md`.
- **RFCs**: discussed publicly; a decision is recorded in `docs/architecture/` once accepted or rejected.

This is a beta project. Response time depends on volunteer availability.
